name: UBA : User Accessing Risky IP Anonymization
notes: Detects when a local user or host is connecting to an external anonymization service.
conditions_text: when the event context is Local to Remote, Remote to Remote
when an event matches all of the following UBA : Common Event Filters
when an event matches any of the following X-Force Risky IP, Anonymization
TD_list: APPLY UBA : User Accessing Risky IP Anonymization on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches all of the following UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when an event matches any of the following X-Force Risky IP, Anonymization
